'''Mohris''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the head [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] of the [[Rimsoo Seven cantina]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Mohris survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]] was moved to a new location. When the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] had no use any more, Mohris and the whole personnel left [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
